data.name: positive
data.label: Positive
data.description: Default favorable valence: the factor tends to facilitate, support or ease expression.

data.name: negative
data.label: Negative
data.description: Default challenging valence: the factor tends to create tension, friction or constraint.

data.name: neutral
data.label: Neutral
data.description: Default neutral valence: the factor is descriptive or balanced without clear facilitation or tension.

data.name: contextual
data.label: Contextual
data.description: Default contextual valence: the factor depends strongly on surrounding chart conditions.

data.name: facilitating
data.label: Facilitating
data.description: The factor tends to help, support, enable or make expression easier.

data.name: tense
data.label: Tense
data.description: The factor tends to create pressure, tension, friction or necessary effort.

data.name: ambivalent
data.label: Ambivalent
data.description: The factor may operate in mixed ways and requires contextual interpretation.

data.name: constructive
data.label: Constructive
data.description: The factor tends to stabilize, integrate, build or organize expression.

data.name: fragilizing
data.label: Fragilizing
data.description: The factor tends to weaken, destabilize, reduce support or make expression more fragile.

data.name: interiorized
data.label: Interiorized
data.description: The factor tends to turn expression inward, slow it down, withdraw it or make it less visible.

data.name: exteriorized
data.label: Exteriorized
data.description: The factor tends to bring expression outward, make it more visible, active or manifest.
